steps.t: Baduhild can be found in Mágla's home in central Middlemead. Thane Mágla has asked that you speak to his wife and son before bringing them to the Mead…
Mágla's sword can be found in his home in central Middlemead. Baduhild has asked you to bring Mágla's sword to her so that she might give it to her so…
Séoca can be found in Mágla's home in central Middlemead. You have found Mágla's sword and should now present it to Séoca as Baduhild asked.
Thane Mágla can be found inside the Mead Hall of Middlemead in Kingstead. You have met with Mágla's family and should now return to him in the Mead Ha…
The waggons can be found throughout Middlemead. Thane Mágla has asked you to ready the waggons as he bids his family and people farewell.
Thane Mágla can be found in the Mead Hall of Middlemead. You have readied the waggons for the people of Middlemead, and they now stand ready to journe…
